deck.title: Mattermost Deck
deck.unreadOnlyNote: Showing the latest unread mentions based on the current unread count.
deck.allTeamsNote: This mode aggregates mentions across every joined team and uses a slower polling interval.
deck.pickDmOrGroup: Pick a direct message or group
deck.selectChannelDesc: Choose which channel this pane should watch.
deck.selectDmDesc: Choose which direct message this pane should watch.
deck.noRecentEvents: No recent API or WebSocket events

options.title: Mattermost Deck
options.connDesc: The extension runs only on the configured Mattermost Server URL. Leave Team Slug blank to enable on all teams, or set it to scope activation to one team.
options.targetHint: In most cases, configuring the Server URL is enough.
options.routeKindsHint: Default is channels,messages,pl. The extension activates only on these URL patterns.
options.healthCheckHint: Default is /api/v4/users/me. The extension confirms this endpoint before rendering.
options.realtimeDesc: The update mode depends on whether a PAT is configured. With a PAT, the deck receives events instantly over WebSocket. Without one, it falls back to polling (periodic REST requests), introducing a delay of up to the polling interval.
options.patHelp: Create it from User Settings > Security > Personal Access Tokens. Personal access tokens must also be enabled by an administrator.
options.pollingHint: Used only when realtime is off. The minimum is {{min}} seconds.
options.appearanceDesc: When set to Mattermost, the right rail follows the colors of the currently open Mattermost page.
options.paneWidthHint: Configurable from {{min}}px to {{max}}px. Used as the initial width when no saved manual resize exists.
options.compactModeHint: Use denser cards and tighter spacing in the deck.
options.showImagePreviewsHint: Show image attachments as thumbnails. When off, images appear as file cards.
options.behaviorDesc: Configure post click action, image display, and Z-order.
options.postClickActionHint: Choose how post cards behave when clicked. Dragging to select text never opens a thread.
options.highZIndexLabel: Use maximum Z-order for the extension
options.highZIndexHint: Off: Z-order 999 (Mattermost dropdowns and popovers appear on top). On: maximum value, the extension renders above everything.
options.reversedPostOrderHint: Display newest posts at the bottom, matching standard Mattermost behavior.
options.paneIdentityHint: Pane type icons are always shown. Enable color accents to add a colored top border to cards in each pane.
options.securityBody: The PAT is no longer stored as plain text. It is saved using client-side encryption that the extension can decrypt locally.
options.securityBody2: Because the key also lives on the client, this is only a minimum layer of protection and not a complete security boundary.
options.securityBody3: Avoid high-privilege tokens. Prefer a dedicated lower-privilege token when possible.
options.invalidServerUrl: Enter the Mattermost Server URL as a valid origin.
options.permissionDenied: Chrome permission for the configured Mattermost origin was denied, so the extension could not be activated. Press Save again to show the permission dialog again.
options.patStorageHint: Use session-only storage by default. Choose persistent storage only if you want the token kept across browser restarts.
options.installPwaDesc: You can launch it directly from the taskbar or Start menu.
options.guideDesc: Mattermost Deck is a Chrome extension that adds a multi-pane sidebar to the right side of Mattermost.
options.guideStep1Desc: Go to the Connection tab, enter your Mattermost Server URL, and click Save. Chrome will ask for host permission on the first save — approve it.
options.guideStep2Desc: Open your Mattermost server in the browser. The Deck panel will appear automatically on the right side.
options.guideStep3Desc: Click the "+" button in the Deck panel to add panes. Each pane scrolls independently and can be reordered or removed. Set a PAT to enable real-time updates.
options.paneTypeChannelWatchDesc: Monitor new posts in a channel
options.paneTypeDmWatchDesc: Show direct messages in real time
options.setupWarning: Initial setup is not complete. Enter the Server URL and press Save.
options.serverUrlRequiredHint: Mattermost Server URL is required before the extension can be activated.
options.firstSavePermDesc: When you save the server URL for the first time, Chrome asks for permission to access that Mattermost server. Approve the request to activate the extension on that server.
options.pollingModeDesc: Sends a REST request every {{sec}} seconds. New posts may take up to {{sec}} seconds to appear.
options.realtimeModeDesc: Subscribes to server events over WebSocket. New posts, mentions, and DMs appear almost instantly.
